standards.subject: Mathematics
standards.fullText: Use a range of multiplicative strategies when operating on whole numbers
standards.pedagogicalNotes: Students need multiple strategies before moving to standard algorithms

standards.subject: Mathematics
standards.fullText: Use a range of multiplicative strategies when operating on whole numbers and fractions
standards.pedagogicalNotes: Extension to fractions requires strong whole number foundation

standards.subject: Social Studies
standards.achievementObjective: Ask questions about past and present events
standards.fullText: Ask questions, gather information, and explore viewpoints about past events, current issues, and aspects of human society
standards.culturalContext: Include perspectives from tangata whenua and diverse communities
standards.pedagogicalNotes: Inquiry process should be culturally responsive and include multiple perspectives

standards.subject: Social Studies
standards.achievementObjective: Understand how cultural practices reflect and express people's customs, traditions, and values
standards.fullText: Understand how cultural practices reflect and express people's customs, traditions, and values, and how these contribute to people's sense of identity and belonging
standards.culturalContext: Emphasizes mātauranga Māori and diverse cultural perspectives as foundational
standards.pedagogicalNotes: Te Mātaiaho emphasizes strengthening identity through local curriculum connections

standards.subject: Aotearoa New Zealand Histories
standards.fullText: Understand that Māori are tangata whenua with an ongoing relationship with this place that is whakapapa-based
standards.culturalContext: Central to New Zealand identity and mandatory learning
standards.pedagogicalNotes: Must be taught with cultural sensitivity and local iwi perspectives

standards.subject: Aotearoa New Zealand Histories
standards.fullText: Understand that colonisation and its consequences have been central to our history for the past 200 years and continue to influence all aspects of New Zealand society
standards.culturalContext: Requires balanced perspectives and cultural sensitivity
standards.pedagogicalNotes: Must present multiple perspectives and ongoing contemporary relevance

standards.subject: Structured Mathematics
standards.achievementObjective: Understand fractions as equal parts of a whole
standards.fullText: Understand fractions as equal parts of a whole, including unit fractions and proper fractions, with connections to decimals and percentages
standards.pedagogicalNotes: Uses rich mathematical tasks with multiple solution pathways
assessmentSuggestions: problem solving tasks with multiple approaches
